hausa.start_your_microphone_and_try_it_when_: Kunna makurufo naka ka gwada shi! Idan ka gama, danna "Kammala."
hausa.mark_warm_up_as_complete: Yiwa dumamawa alama a matsayin cikakke
hausa.available_warm_up_exercises: Atisayen dumamawa da ake da su
hausa.the_melody_of_your_speech_rising_pitch: Karin maganarka. Tsayin murya mai hawa = tambayoyi, mai sauka = maganganu, canji = jaddadawa.
hausa.how_fast_you_are_speaking_in_words_per: Yadda kake magana da sauri, cikin kalmomi a minti.
hausa.your_speaking_volume_and_steadiness_ov: Ƙarfin muryarka na magana da daidaituwarsa a tsawon lokaci.
hausa.good_speakers_use_pauses_aim_for_20_30: Kyawawan masu magana suna amfani da tsayawa! Ka nufi 20-30% na tsayawa a maganarka.
hausa.fluency_disfluency_tracker: Mai bin diddigin gwaninta / rashin gwaninta
hausa.analyzes_pause_patterns_syllable_rate_: Yana nazarin salon tsayawa, daidaituwar saurin baƙaƙe, da daidaituwar ƙarfin murya don samar da makin gwaninta. Yi rikodin aƙalla daƙiƙa 10 na magana, sannan ka danna "Nazarin gwaninta."
hausa.analyze_fluency_from_current_recording: Nazarin gwaninta daga bayanan rikodin yanzu
hausa.formant_vowel_space_lab: Dakin gwaje-gwaje na sararin wasali da formant
hausa.visualizes_your_vowel_sounds_on_an_ipa: Yana nuna sautunanka na wasali a kan murabba'in wasali na IPA ta amfani da nazarin formant (F1/F2). Furta wasali ka kalli ɗigon yana motsi don nuna inda wasalinka ya faɗo. Yanayin sawu yana nuna sauye-sauyen diphthong!
hausa.green_circles_target_vowel_positions_o: Da'irorin kore = wuraren wasali da ake nufi. Ɗigon lemu = wasalinka na yanzu. Sawun shunayya = sauye-sauyen wasali na baya-bayan nan.
hausa.recordings_are_automatically_saved_whe: Ana adana rikodi ta atomatik idan ka dakatar da makurufo. Sake kunna su tare da bayanin kari da aka daidaita. Ana ajiye rikodi 3 na ƙarshe.
hausa.no_recordings_yet_start_and_stop_the_m: Babu rikodi tukuna. Kunna ka kuma dakatar da makurufo don adana rikodi.
hausa.select_first_recording_to_compare: Zaɓi rikodi na farko don kwatanta
hausa.select_second_recording_to_compare: Zaɓi rikodi na biyu don kwatanta
hausa.choose_an_exercise_type_the_tool_will_: Zaɓi nau'in atisaye. Kayan aikin zai ba ka jimloli don yin atisaye tare da amsawar kari ta ainihin lokaci.
hausa.say_this_phrase_with_the_emotion_below: Faɗi wannan jimlar tare da motsin rai da ke ƙasa. Kalli yadda tsayin muryarka da ƙarfin murya suke canzawa!
hausa.say_the_phrase_with_this_feeling_notic: Faɗi jimlar tare da WANNAN ji. Lura da abin da ke faruwa da tsayin muryarka!
hausa.i_practiced_this_phrase_record_it: Na yi atisayen wannan jimlar, yi mata rikodi
hausa.say_the_same_words_as_a_statement_pitc: Faɗi kalmomi iri ɗaya a matsayin magana (tsayin murya yana sauka a ƙarshe) da kuma a matsayin tambaya (tsayin murya yana hawa). Kalli bambanci a jadawalin tsayin murya!
hausa.the_same_sentence_means_different_thin: Jimla iri ɗaya tana nufin abubuwa daban-daban dangane da kalmar da kake jaddadawa. Zaɓi kalma a ƙasa, sannan ka faɗi jimlar kana jaddada wannan kalmar.
hausa.select_word_to_emphasize: Zaɓi kalmar da za ka jaddada
hausa.read_the_passage_below_at_the_target_s: Karanta rubutun da ke ƙasa a gudun da ake nufi. Ma'aunin gudu zai nuna maka yadda kake tafiya da sauri!
hausa.keep_going_hold_your_volume_steady: Ci gaba! Riƙe ƙarfin muryarka daidai.
hausa.target_pitch_pattern_green_zone_target: Salon tsayin murya da ake nufi (yankin kore = manufa, lemu = tsayin muryarka):
hausa.start_practicing_this_intonation_patte: Fara yin atisayen wannan salon kari
hausa.say_the_phrase_now_try_to_match_the_gr: Faɗi jimlar yanzu! Ka yi ƙoƙarin daidaita da yankin kore da ake nufi.
hausa.slps_use_specific_prosody_patterns_as_: Masana maganin magana suna amfani da takamaiman salon kari a matsayin manufofin asibiti. Zaɓi salo don ganin siffar tsayin murya da ake nufi da yin atisayen daidaita ta.
hausa.multilingual_pronunciation_lab: Dakin gwaje-gwaje na furuci na harsuna da yawa
hausa.practice_pronunciation_in_any_language: Yi atisayen furuci a kowane harshe! AI zai yi samfurin jimlar, sannan kai kana ƙoƙarin daidaita karinta.
hausa.phrase_to_practice: Jimlar da za a yi atisaye
hausa.hear_the_ai_model_speak_this_phrase: Ji samfurin AI yana faɗin wannan jimlar
hausa.your_turn_speak_the_phrase_and_try_to_: Lokacinka! Faɗi jimlar ka yi ƙoƙarin daidaita salon tsayin murya.
hausa.dashed_line_model_solid_line_your_spee: Layin da aka yanka = samfuri, cikakken layi = maganarka. Ka yi ƙoƙarin sa su su daidaita!
hausa.prosody_comparison_graph_showing_model: Jadawalin kwatanta kari da ke nuna kwana ta samfuri da kwana ta maganarka a jere
hausa.summary_of_your_practice_session_share: Taƙaitaccen bayanin zamanka na atisaye. Raba shi da masanin maganin maganarka!
hausa.generate_a_text_summary_of_this_sessio: Ƙirƙiri taƙaitaccen rubutu na wannan zama wanda za ka iya raba shi da masanin maganin maganarka.
hausa.clear_all_session_data_and_start_fresh: Share duk bayanan zama ka sake farawa
hausa.oratory_and_prosody_communication_lab: Dakin gwaje-gwaje na sadarwar jawabi da kari
hausa.go_back_to_stem_lab_tool_list: Koma ga jerin kayan aikin STEM Lab
hausa.speech_prosody_visualization_for_slp_r: Nunin karin magana don atisayen da masanin magana ya ba da shawara
hausa.live_visualizer_record_read_your_deliv: Na'urar hangen nesa kai tsaye — yi rikodi ka karanta gabatarwarka
hausa.real_time_pitch_trace_volume_meter_fil: Bin diddigin tsayin murya na ainihin lokaci + ma'aunin ƙarfin murya + mai ƙidayar kalmomin cikawa. Masu magana da suka horar suna canza tsayin murya da ~30% a jimla; gabatarwa mai lebur tana rasa hankalin mai sauraro cikin ~daƙiƙa 20.
hausa.pacing_target_150_wpm_pauses_between_i: Manufar gudu ~kalmomi 150/minti. Tsayawa tsakanin ra'ayoyi (daƙiƙa 1-2) suna da nauyi kamar kalmomi. Karanta rubutunka da babbar murya da farko; jimlolin da ba su dace ba suna bayyana kai tsaye.
hausa.multilingual_same_speech_multiple_lang: Harsuna da yawa — jawabi iri ɗaya, harsuna da yawa
hausa.speech_rate_varies_dramatically_by_lan: Saurin magana ya bambanta sosai bisa harshe: Sifaniyanci + Jafananci ~baƙaƙe 7/daƙiƙa; Turanci ~6; Mandariyanci ~5. Saurin bayanai kusan tsayayye ne — harsuna masu yawan magana ana yin su a hankali.
hausa.pace_pitch_range_filler_word_density_p: Gudu, fadin tsayin murya, yawan kalmomin cikawa, lokacin tsayawa — kowanne ana ba shi maki bisa manufofin da bincike ya goyi baya. Danna kowane fanni don ganin ambato + shawarar horo.
hausa.prosody_discover_how_delivery_shapes_m: Kari — gano yadda gabatarwa ke tsara ma'ana
hausa.adjust_pitch_offset_pace_and_volume_ga: Daidaita gyaran tsayin murya, gudu, da ƙara ƙarfin murya, sannan ka rubuta abin da ka lura. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa — ƙirƙiri hasashenka game da dalilin da yasa yawancin jawabai na TED suke kusa da kalmomi 150/minti.
hausa.suited_to_emphasis_reflection_gravitas: Ya dace da jaddadawa, tunani, girma.
hausa.default_for_most_speaking_natural_rhyt: Tsoho don yawancin magana. Kari na halitta.
hausa.conveys_excitement_urgency_energy: Yana isar da farin ciki, gaggawa, kuzari.
hausa.adjust_pitch_offset_pacing_volume_disc: Daidaita gyaran tsayin murya, gudu, ƙarfin murya. Rarrabuwa daban na tempo 4. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa.
hausa.hypothesis_how_does_pace_affect_audien: Hasashe: Ta yaya gudu ke shafar fahimtar masu sauraro?
hausa.most_ted_talks_are_150_wpm_investigate: Yawancin jawabai na TED su ne ~kalmomi 150/minti. Bincika dalili.
hausa.when_does_pitch_variation_help_vs_dist: Yaushe canjin tsayin murya ke taimakawa da yaushe yake shagaltarwa?
hausa.explain_how_prosody_shapes_oratory_imp: Bayyana yadda kari ke tsara tasirin jawabi.
hausa.design_note_discrete_4_tempo_marker_no: Bayanin ƙira: alamar tempo 4 daban; babu makin gabatarwa; babu bayyanawa — da gangan.
hausa.this_tool_is_designed_as_a_tier_1_clas: An ƙera wannan kayan aiki a matsayin sa hannun aji na Mataki na 1. Don maganin magana na mutum, da fatan a nemi shawarar masanin maganin magana da aka tabbatar.
hausa.visualizations_use_web_audio_api_pitch: Nunin suna amfani da gano tsayin murya na Web Audio API (dangantakar kai) da nazarin girma. Duk sarrafawa yana faruwa a cikin gida a cikin birawsa — babu sautin da ake rikodi ko aikawa.
